prompt.label: Page 1 - 8 SOT JSON
prompt.value:
{
  "pages": [
    {
      "page": 1,
      "direction": "Protagonist introduced — full body and face. Then: warm, fragmentary memories of mother (back turned, face never clear). These establish 'the mother she knew' — gentle, quiet, unremarkable. The notebook discovery at bottom is casual. The reader doesn't yet know this object will shatter everything.",
      "panels": [
        {
          "id": "P1_1",
          "camera": "LS, slight low angle, normal lens",
          "subject": "Protagonist full body. Standing in tatami room among cardboard boxes. Simple clothes (jeans, loose shirt). Posture slightly hunched, one arm hanging. Emotionally flat.",
          "expression": "none visible. Posture says 'going through motions'.",
          "light": "natural afternoon light from window R. Flat, muted.",
          "text": "母が死んだ。",
          "text_pos": "top-left",
          "note": "First image of protagonist. Full body establishes her physical presence. Readers see: young woman, alone, surrounded by boxes."
        },
        {
          "id": "P1_2",
          "camera": "CU, straight on, shallow focus",
          "subject": "Protagonist's face. Same flat expression as body. Eyes cast slightly downward. No tears, no visible grief — just absence.",
          "expression": "empty. The face of someone who hasn't processed anything yet.",
          "text": null,
          "note": "Face reveal. Reader sees who she is. The emptiness is deliberate — it will contrast with P2's emotional break."
        },
        {
          "id": "P1_3",
          "camera": "MS, slightly low angle (child's eye height)",
          "subject": "MEMORY — Mother's back in kitchen. Washing dishes or preparing food. Steam rising softly. Apron strings tied at waist. Hair pinned up. Face NOT visible — only back and silhouette.",
          "light": "warm kitchen light, soft — contrast to present-day flatness",
          "border": "soft edge / vignette to signal memory",
          "text": "覚えているのは、台所に立つ後ろ姿。",
          "text_pos": "top",
          "note": "First glimpse of mother. Deliberately only her back. The protagonist's memory of her is warm but incomplete — she never truly saw her."
        },
        {
          "id": "P1_4",
          "camera": "MS, low angle (child POV looking up), backlit",
          "subject": "MEMORY — Mother kneeling to speak to young protagonist (~5 years old). Mother's face in shadow / turned slightly away — features not clear. One hand reaching gently toward the child. Soft, protective posture.",
          "light": "backlit from window behind mother. Face in silhouette. Halo of warm light around hair edges.",
          "border": "soft edge / vignette to signal memory",
          "text": "正直に言えば、僕は母のことをよく知らなかったし、知ろうともしなかった。",
          "text_pos": "bottom",
          "note": "Mother speaks to child but we never see her face clearly. The memory is warm but surface-level. This is the 'known mother' — about to be shattered by the notebook."
        },
        {
          "id": "P1_5",
          "camera": "ECU, shallow focus, hand only",
          "subject": "Hand pulling worn notebook from cardboard box. Grip is casual, not careful — a stranger's object.",
          "detail": "Cover worn, corners rounded from years of use. Box also holds mundane items: glasses case, faded envelope.",
          "text_pos": "center",
          "note": "No reverence. She doesn't know what this is. The casual handling will contrast sharply with P8_3's gentle touch."
        }
      ]
    },

    {
      "page": 2,
      "title": "ノート",
      "direction": "SPREAD IMPACT: Reader sees P1 (warm memories of gentle mother) and P2 (raw, wounded writing) simultaneously. The gap is the gut punch. P2_1: the notebook's content — nothing like the mother she knew. P2_2: hands shake. P2_3: she breaks — but the break is a laugh, not a sob.",
      "panels": [
        {
          "id": "P2_1",
          "bleed": true,
          "type": "composite — base layer + inset closeups",
          "base": {
            "camera": "top-down, bird's eye, flat",
            "subject": "Notebook open spread filling frame. Dense scrawled handwriting covers both pages. Most illegible at this scale — texture of obsession.",

            "detail": "Ink smudges. Pen pressure varies wildly. Some lines scratched out. One spot where paper is nearly torn."
          },
          "insets": [
            {
              "camera": "ECU, flat, macro",
              "handwriting": "「あの夜のことが 今も心に残っているのに」",
              "ink": "steady but slow strokes, deliberate, as if written through clenched teeth"
            },
            {
              "camera": "ECU, flat, macro",
              "handwriting": "「朝になったら 全てが変わってしまった」",
              "ink": "smaller letters, shrinking toward end of line, trailing off"
            },
            {
              "camera": "ECU, flat, macro",
              "handwriting": "「わたしの中に残ったものを\n　あの人は何とも思っていない」",
              "ink": "two lines, second line indented. pen pressure increases — ink pooling on strokes"
            },
            {
              "camera": "ECU, flat, macro",
              "handwriting": "「許せなかった　でも一番許せないのは\n　まだ覚えている自分」",
              "ink": "first line heavy, second line trembling. pen pressure intense"
            }
          ],
          "layout_note": "Base notebook fills entire panel. 4 insets float on top like magnifying glasses hovering over the page. Insets have thin white borders to separate from base. They are placed roughly where these fragments exist on the actual notebook page. Reader's eye jumps between insets, piecing together the story.",
          "text": null,
          "note": "No narration. The mother's handwriting IS the content. Reader reads her words directly."
        },
        {
          "id": "P2_2",
          "camera": "ECU, overhead, hands only",
          "subject": "Both hands holding notebook. Fingers trembling visibly. Knuckles tensed. One tear drop has landed on the page — ink slightly bleeding where tear fell.",
          "detail": "The tear is NOT on her face. We see it only as a wet spot on the notebook page, ink dissolving. We don't see her face at all.",
          "monologue": "あの穏やかだった母が、こんなことを——",
          "text_pos": "bottom, small",
          "note": "This line bridges P1's warm memories to P2's raw content. The gap between 'the mother I knew' and 'the mother who wrote this' becomes unbearable. Face deliberately hidden."
        },
        {
          "id": "P2_3",
          "camera": "LS, behind protagonist, low angle looking over her shoulder",
          "subject": "Back of protagonist. Hunched over notebook on floor. Small figure against large empty room. Boxes around her. Generous white space above and sides.",
          "white_space": "60%+ of panel is empty room/ceiling. Protagonist is small in frame.",
          "dialogue": "ははっ、なんだこれ",
          "text_pos": "center of white space, isolated, small font",
          "hiki": "Emotional break. Dry laugh. Reader feels the crack but doesn't see her face. Must turn page to understand what she found.",
          "note": "The laugh is not comedic. It's the sound of someone whose armor just broke and they don't know what to do. 'ははっ' not 'ハハッ' — hiragana, soft."
        }
      ]
    },

    {
      "page": 3,
      "title": "気づき",
      "mekuri": "After the emotional break, reader turns to find: what specifically did she read? P3_1 shows the page that broke her. P3_2 is the realization. P3_3 bridges to the sea.",
      "panels": [
        {
          "id": "P3_1",
          "camera": "CU, overhead 30deg, shallow focus on page",
          "subject": "Notebook different page. Later entry. Calmer handwriting — still rough but the storm has passed. Protagonist's fingertip touching page. Tear stain from P2 visible at edge.",
          "handwriting_visible": "「もう関係ない　あの人のことは\n　でも書くことで やっと手放せる気がする」",
          "ink": "even pressure, slower, almost meditative. She is writing herself back together.",
          "text": "他人に見せるつもりで書かれたものじゃない。\nでもだからこそ、彼女がそこにいた。",
          "text_pos": "top",
          "note": "Contrast to P2_1: P2 was the wound, P3_1 is the recovery. Same notebook, different temperature."
        },
        {
          "id": "P3_2",
          "camera": "ECU, straight on, macro lens",
          "subject": "Eyes only between black L/R bars (cinemascope). No tears now — clear, focused. Something understood.",
          "detail": "Tiny orange dot in L pupil (foreshadow).",
          "text": "創造とは、自分の内側にある言葉にできないものを形にして、\nそれを受け取った誰かと、言葉を超えた深さで通じ合う行為だ。",
          "text_pos": "split above/below bars",
          "text_style": "mincho bold, large"
        },
        {
          "id": "P3_3",
          "camera": "ECU, overhead, notebook page — tighter than P3_1",
          "subject": "Another page of notebook. Among the scrawl, one line stands out: 「僕たちは難破船みたいなものだ」 written larger, circled loosely by mother's own hand.",
          "detail": "Protagonist's finger rests next to this line. The rest of the page has other text but this line dominates.",
          "text": null,
          "note": "No narration needed. The mother's own words become the bridge to the metaphor. Reader reads 「僕たちは難破船みたいなものだ」 and turns the page to find —",
          "hiki": "Mother's words on page. Her metaphor becomes her vision.",
          "match_cut_to": "P4_1 — notebook page (ECU flat surface) → sea surface (ELS). White paper becomes dark water. The text 「難破船」becomes the actual ship."
        }
      ]
    },

    {
      "page": 4,
      "title": "海",
      "match_cut_from": "P3_3 notebook surface → P4_1 sea surface. Mother's word '難破船' materializes. Flat overhead page → flat overhead ocean. Same camera angle, scale explodes.",
      "panels": [
        {
          "id": "P4_1",
          "bleed": true,
          "camera": "ELS, high angle (matching P3_3's overhead), ultra wide",
          "subject": "Dark sea. Horizon upper 1/4. One small broken ship center-right. Tiny figure standing on deck.",
          "text": "僕たちは荒れた海に放り出された難破船のようなものだ。",
          "text_pos": "top",
          "note": "The narration echoes the mother's words from P3_3, but now in protagonist's voice. Mother wrote it. She lives it."
        },
        {
          "id": "P4_2",
          "camera": "MS, eye-level, silhouette",
          "subject": "Figure on ship. Pure black silhouette against gray sea.",
          "text": "それぞれが孤独で、自分の人生に価値があるのかもわからない。",
          "text_pos": "center",
          "hiki": "Maximum isolation. Thin panel = claustrophobia."
        }
      ]
    },

    {
      "page": 5,
      "title": "たいまつ",
      "color_event": "★ FIRST ORANGE",
      "mekuri": "P4 darkness → orange fire.",
      "panels": [
        {
          "id": "P5_1",
          "bleed": true,
          "camera": "LS, low angle (from water up), normal lens",
          "subject": "Same ship, same figure. Torch held high. ORANGE flame (#FF6B00–#FF9500). Face lit from below. Orange on water.",
          "text": "しかし、たいまつを灯して自分の位置を知らせることはできる。",
          "text_pos": "top"
        },
        {
          "id": "P5_2",
          "page_note": "LEFT page (P5_1 is RIGHT full bleed, P5_2+P5_3 are LEFT)",
          "camera": "ELS, eye-level, wide",
          "subject": "Dark sea horizon. 3-4 small orange dots at distance.",
          "text": "その灯りが、作品だ。",
          "text_pos": "center"
        },
        {
          "id": "P5_3",
          "camera": "LS, slight high angle",
          "subject": "Two ships from L and R, torches, orange overlap in center. Faces becoming visible.",
          "text": "灯りを見つけた誰かが、こちらに向かって漕いでくる。",
          "dialogue": "「——お前もそこにいたのか」",
          "dialogue_style": "no bubble, between ships",
          "match_cut_to": "P6_1 — approaching light on water → facing monitor light. Same body-to-light composition."
        }
      ]
    },

    {
      "page": 6,
      "title": "AIという炎",
      "match_cut_from": "P5_3 figure toward torch light → P6_1 figure toward monitor light.",
      "panels": [
        {
          "id": "P6_1",
          "camera": "OTS, shallow focus on monitor",
          "subject": "Protagonist silhouette. Monitor with AI video tool. Room dark.",
          "light": "monitor glow only",
          "text": "そして今、AIという道具が現れた。",
          "text_pos": "center"
        },
        {
          "id": "P6_2",
          "bleed": true,
          "camera": "conceptual montage",
          "subject": "Images bursting from monitor: elderly person's memories (L), child's fantasy (C), emotion swirl (R). Overflows screen edge.",
          "text": "かつては映画監督やアニメーターだけが持てた「映像で語る力」を、\n誰もが手にできる時代が来ている。",
          "text_pos": "bottom",
          "intent": "Showcase panel. Max art quality."
        },
        {
          "id": "P6_3",
          "camera": "LS, eye-level, wide + inset ECU bottom-right",
          "subject": "Sea. Torch → massive light column. Illuminates vast ocean.",
          "inset": "Fist clenched. Orange flame reflected in knuckles.",
          "text": "今まで「物語を持っていたが、伝える手段を持たなかった人たち」が、初めて語り始められる。\nしかし———",
          "text_pos": "bottom",
          "hiki": "「しかし———」+ fist. Hope interrupted."
        }
      ]
    },

    {
      "page": 7,
      "title": "怒り",
      "mekuri": "「しかし———」→「しかし現実は、まだこうだ。」",
      "panels": [
        {
          "id": "P7_1",
          "camera": "POV (phone screen)",
          "subject": "SNS timeline. 「AIアニメなんて所詮パクリ」「AIに創造は無理」「権利関係クリアしてから出直して」. High likes. Tense hand R edge.",
          "text": "しかし現実は、まだこうだ。",
          "text_pos": "top-left"
        },
        {
          "id": "P7_2",
          "camera": "POV (different screen)",
          "subject": "Video thumbnail grid. Mass-produced AI content. High views. Recycled IP.",
          "text": "著作権を無視した作品が闊歩している。その怒りがある。",
          "text_pos": "bottom"
        },
        {
          "id": "P7_3",
          "camera": "CU, profile R",
          "subject": "Protagonist looking at own hand.",
          "text_pos": "center",
          "match_cut_to": "P7_4 — profile → front. Same head, 90deg toward camera."
        },
        {
          "id": "P7_4",
          "camera": "MCU, straight on, locked",
          "subject": "Face direct to camera. Mouth shut. Eyes steady. Orange dot in L pupil.",
          "bg": "black solid",
          "text": "自分たちの手で、自分たちのIPで、\nプロのスタジオが唸るような作品を——まだつくれていない。\nその怒りの方がずっと大きい。",
          "text_pos": "bottom, 3 lines",
          "text_style": "mincho bold, largest in manga"
        }
      ]
    },

    {
      "page": 8,
      "title": "船団、そして手記",
      "direction": "Fleet → departure → closed notebook. Story returns to the physical object that started everything.",
      "panels": [
        {
          "id": "P8_1",
          "bleed": true,
          "camera": "ELS, slight high angle, ultra wide",
          "subject": "Dark sea. 20-30 ships with orange torches clustered loosely. Overlapping light. Dawn glow at horizon.",
          "text": "この場所は、その怒りと渇望から生まれた。",
          "text_pos": "top"
        },
        {
          "id": "P8_2",
          "camera": "MS, eye-level",
          "subject": "Protagonist back view, standing. Fleet lights in BG. Sky brightening.",
          "text": "僕たちはもっと人生を楽しんで、表現して、共有して、\n孤独な世界から旅立たないといけない。",
          "text_pos": "center"
        },
        {
          "id": "P8_3",
          "camera": "CU, overhead, flat (same angle as P2_1)",
          "subject": "The notebook, closed. Worn cover. Protagonist's hand resting on top — gently, no longer casual like P1_3. The same object, but the relationship to it has completely changed.",
          "detail": "Cover slightly warped from the tear that fell on it in P2_2.",
          "text": null,
          "title_card": {
            "text": "AI Creator Directoryは\n——そのための船団。",
            "style": "mincho bold, ORANGE",
            "position": "bottom center, below notebook"
          },
          "match_cut_from": "P2_1 (notebook open, overhead) → P8_3 (notebook closed, overhead). Same camera. Also echoes P1_5 casual discovery → P8_3 tender holding.",
          "note": "Final image is the notebook that started everything — now closed, held with care. The fleet lives in the protagonist's mind. But the notebook is real."
        }
      ]
    }
  ],

  "match_cuts": [
    {
      "from": "P3_3", "to": "P4_1",
      "type": "graphic + diegetic",
      "description": "Notebook page with 「僕たちは難破船みたいなものだ」(overhead, flat) → dark sea (overhead, flat). Same camera angle. Mother's word becomes the image. Paper surface → water surface."
    },
    {
      "from": "P5_3", "to": "P6_1",
      "type": "action match",
      "description": "Figure approaching torch on water → figure facing monitor light. Same body-to-light relationship."
    },
    {
      "from": "P7_3", "to": "P7_4",
      "type": "subject match",
      "description": "Profile → front. Same head rotated 90deg."
    },
    {
      "from": "P2_1", "to": "P8_3",
      "type": "bookend",
      "description": "Notebook open (P2_1, overhead) → notebook closed (P8_3, overhead). Same camera. Story completes the circle. Note: P1_5 is the casual discovery; P2_1 is the first full view of its content."
    }
  ],

  "hiki_mekuri": [
    {
      "hiki": "P2_3", "mekuri": "P3_1",
      "hook": "「ははっ、なんだこれ」— emotional break, back turned, face unseen",
      "payoff": "The specific page that broke her. Reader finally sees what she read."
    },
    {
      "hiki": "P3_3", "mekuri": "P4_1",
      "hook": "Mother's scrawl 「僕たちは難破船みたいなものだ」",
      "payoff": "The metaphor materializes — dark sea, actual shipwreck."
    },
    {
      "hiki": "P4_2", "mekuri": "P5_1",
      "hook": "Darkness, isolation, compressed panel",
      "payoff": "Same sea + ORANGE fire. First color."
    },
    {
      "hiki": "P6_3", "mekuri": "P7_1",
      "hook": "「しかし———」+ clenched fist",
      "payoff": "「しかし現実は、まだこうだ。」+ SNS"
    }
  ],

  "color_map": {
    "P1-P3": "monochrome only. P1_3-P1_4 memory panels use softer tones (lighter, warmer grays) vs present-day panels.",
    "P3_2": "tiny orange dot in pupil (foreshadow)",
    "P4": "monochrome, darkest",
    "P5": "ORANGE introduced (torch)",
    "P6": "ORANGE (lighthouse)",
    "P7_4": "orange in pupil (callback)",
    "P8": "ORANGE (fleet, dawn, title card)"
  },

  "notebook_arc": {
    "P1_3-P1_4": "BEFORE notebook: warm memories of mother — kitchen back view, speaking to child. Face never visible. Establishes 'the known mother'.",
    "P1_5": "Pulled from box casually. Unknown object.",
    "P2_1": "Opened. 4 inset closeups reveal: body given away, discarded the next morning, shame that the body still remembers. Raw, poetic, unflinching.",
    "P2_2": "Tear falls on page. Hands shake. Face never shown.",
    "P3_1": "Later page. Calmer. 'Writing to let go.' Recovery after the wound.",
    "P3_3": "「僕たちは難破船みたいなものだ」. Mother's metaphor becomes the bridge.",
    "P8_3": "Closed. Held with care. Cover warped from tear. Full circle."
  },

  "camera_legend": {
    "ELS": "Extreme Long Shot",
    "LS": "Long Shot",
    "MS": "Medium Shot",
    "MCU": "Medium Close-Up",
    "CU": "Close-Up",
    "ECU": "Extreme Close-Up",
    "OTS": "Over The Shoulder",
    "POV": "Point of View"
  }
}

【🚨 MANDATORY SYSTEM INSTRUCTION - CRITICAL 🚨】
右上が一番最初、左下が一番最後のコマ
 画像リファレンスは確実に参照してください！！
You MUST generate a manga page that follows EVERY requirement below.
Failure to follow these requirements means the image is invalid.

【1️⃣  COLOR PALETTE - NON-NEGOTIABLE】
- Render in pure monochrome/grayscale only

【2️⃣  SPEECH BUBBLES - CRITICAL】
EVERY speech bubble MUST:
  ✗ NOT contain speaker names (e.g., "林:" is PROHIBITED)
  ✗ NOT contain quotation marks (「」 brackets are PROHIBITED)
  ✓ BE written in VERTICAL Japanese (右から左へ、上から下へ)
  ✓ ONLY contain the dialogue text itself
  ✓ Point tail/stem to the speaking character's mouth

EXAMPLE:
  ✗ WRONG: 「林：こんにちは」 (horizontal, with speaker name)
  ✓ RIGHT:  こ
          ん
          に
          ち
          は  (vertical, text only)

【3️⃣  PANEL LAYOUT - MANDATORY】
- DO NOT SHOW TITLE OF THE PAGE
- Reading order: Right column top→bottom, then left column top→bottom
- Visual clarity: Readers should never be confused about reading order
- Dynamic panels allowed for action/dramatic scenes

【5️⃣  CHARACTER CONSISTENCY】
- Match reference images for character appearance
- Speaking character: mouth open
- Listening character: mouth closed
- Speech bubble tail points to open mouth
- Character positions consistent with dialogue

【6️⃣  LINE WEIGHTS & TEXTURE】
✓ LINE WORK (線画の特徴):
  - Simple but expressive linework
  - NOT overly detailed or complex

✓ WHITE SPACE USAGE (余白の活用):
  - Empty backgrounds in emotional scenes
  - Let characters "breathe" in the composition

✓ BACKGROUNDS (背景):
  - Convey emotions in minimal way

✓ SCREEN TONES (スクリーントーン):
  - Minimal and strategic use

【OUTPUT VALIDATION CHECKLIST】
Before generating the image, you MUST check:

☐ NO colors present (grayscale only)
☐ ALL speech bubbles are vertical
☐ NO speaker names in bubbles
☐ NO quotation marks (「」) in bubbles
☐ Panel reading order is clear
☐ Character expressions match context
☐ Speech tail points to mouth
☐ All dialogue is included
☐ Character positions match description

If ANY item is unchecked, REGENERATE the image.
